name: build

desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: currentUser
desc: Current user

name: onAuthStateChange
desc: Stream of auth state changes

name: signInWithIdToken
desc: Initiate Google Sign-In flow

name: signOut
desc: Sign out from both Google and Supabase

name: aggregateStatus
desc: Aggregate stats over a list of days' records

name: calculateStreak
desc:
Count current streak: consecutive days (backwards from today) with no missed prayers.
dayRecords: map of dateKey → list of PrayerRecord

name: dailyCompletionPercent
desc: Daily completion % — counts onTime prayers out of 5

name: dailyPercents
desc: Per-day completion % (for chart bars)

name: hasMissed
desc: Whether a day has any missed prayers

name: isDayFullyComplete
desc: Full completion = all 5 on time (no missed, no qaza)

name: overallPercent
desc: Overall completion % across multiple days (logged prayers only)

name: deleteByDate
desc: Delete records for a specific date (debug helper)

name: getAll
desc: Get all records (for streak calculation etc.)

name: getByDate
desc: Get all records for a specific date

name: getByDateRange
desc: Get records for a range of dates

name: upsertRecord
desc: Upsert: insert or replace on conflict (date, prayerName)

name: currentMonth
desc: Get dates of the current calendar month

name: currentWeek
desc: Get dates of the current calendar week (Mon–Sun)

name: dayAbbr
desc: Day-of-week abbreviations

name: displayDate
desc: Human-readable full date

name: fromKey
desc: Parse storage key back to DateTime

name: isSameDay
desc: Whether two DateTimes are on the same calendar day

name: isToday
desc: Whether a date key is today

name: lastNDays
desc: Get a list of days dates ending today (inclusive), oldest first

name: monthLabel
desc: Month label

name: shortDate
desc: Human-readable short date

name: toKey
desc: Convert DateTime → storage key (yyyy-MM-dd)

name: todayKey
desc: Today's key

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: runBuild
desc: Executes Notifier.build.
